mapper.select: select id, name, icon, sort, status, create_time from service_category where status = 1 order by sort asc, id asc

select s.id, s.category_id, c.name as category_name, s.name, s.description, s.features, s.price, s.type, s.sales, s.image, s.cover, s.duration, s.status, s.create_time from service_item s left join service_category c on s.category_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}
